entries.title: Isaiah 52:12
entries.author: Adam Clarke (1760–1832)
entries.content: Verse 28 From Tamar - in Kadesh - The former was on the south of the Dead Sea; and the latter, or Kadesh-Barnea, was still farther south, and at the extremity of the portion of Gad, which was the most southern tribe, as Dan was the most northern.
